scripts.build: bun run --cwd packages/tui build && bun run --cwd packages/models build && bun run --cwd packages/ai build && bun run --cwd packages/agent build && bun run --cwd packages/coding-agent build && bun run --cwd packages/web-ui build
scripts.dev: concurrently --names "ai,agent,coding-agent,web-ui,tui" --prefix-colors "cyan,yellow,red,green,magenta" "bun run --cwd packages/ai dev" "bun run --cwd packages/agent dev" "bun run --cwd packages/coding-agent dev" "bun run --cwd packages/web-ui dev" "bun run --cwd packages/tui dev"
scripts.dev:tsc: concurrently --names "ai,web-ui" --prefix-colors "cyan,green" "bun run --cwd packages/ai dev:tsc" "bun run --cwd packages/web-ui dev:tsc"
scripts.check: bun run build && bun run lint && bun run check:browser-smoke && bun run --cwd packages/web-ui check
scripts.lint: oxlint -A no-control-regex -A no-unused-vars -A no-new-array -A no-useless-fallback-in-spread -A const-comparisons -A no-useless-escape -A no-unreachable -A no-this-alias -A no-useless-spread -A no-constant-binary-expression -A no-unsafe-optional-chaining --ignore-pattern packages/coding-agent/examples/extensions/doom-overlay/doom/build/doom.js .
scripts.version:patch: bun pm version patch --no-git-tag-version && node scripts/sync-versions.js && shx rm -rf node_modules packages/*/node_modules bun.lock && bun install
scripts.version:minor: bun pm version minor --no-git-tag-version && node scripts/sync-versions.js && shx rm -rf node_modules packages/*/node_modules bun.lock && bun install
scripts.version:major: bun pm version major --no-git-tag-version && node scripts/sync-versions.js && shx rm -rf node_modules packages/*/node_modules bun.lock && bun install
scripts.prepublishOnly: bun run clean && bun run build && bun run check
scripts.publish: bun run prepublishOnly && bun publish --cwd packages/models --access public && bun publish --cwd packages/tui --access public && bun publish --cwd packages/ai --access public && bun publish --cwd packages/agent --access public && bun publish --cwd packages/coding-agent --access public && bun publish --cwd packages/web-ui --access public
scripts.publish:dry: bun run prepublishOnly && bun publish --cwd packages/models --access public --dry-run && bun publish --cwd packages/tui --access public --dry-run && bun publish --cwd packages/ai --access public --dry-run && bun publish --cwd packages/agent --access public --dry-run && bun publish --cwd packages/coding-agent --access public --dry-run && bun publish --cwd packages/web-ui --access public --dry-run
